kols.name: Dr. Sarah Kim
kols.bio: Dr. Sarah Kim is a board-certified orthodontist with 18 years of clinical experience specializing in clear aligner therapy and early interceptive treatment. She has published over 30 peer-reviewed articles and lectures internationally on digital orthodontics.
kols.internal_notes: Strong social presence. Has partnered with Invisalign for webinars.

kols.name: Prof. Carlos Mendez
kols.bio: Prof. Mendez leads the implantology department at the University of Barcelona and has placed over 8,000 implants in his career. He is an ITI Fellow and lectures extensively across Europe and Latin America.

kols.name: Dr. Priya Nair
kols.bio: Dr. Priya Nair is a renowned cosmetic dentist based in London, specializing in smile makeovers, veneers, and composite bonding. She is a member of the British Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry and has been featured in Vogue and The Times.
kols.internal_notes: Prefers WhatsApp for first contact. Availability limited to weekdays.

kols.name: Dr. James Fitzgerald
kols.bio: Dr. James Fitzgerald is a periodontist and implant specialist based in Toronto, Canada. He is a Fellow of the Royal College of Dentists of Canada and has contributed to national guidelines on periodontal disease management.

kols.name: Dr. Yuki Tanaka
kols.bio: Dr. Yuki Tanaka is a researcher and clinician at Osaka University focused on CAD/CAM dental restorations and digital workflow optimization. She has co-authored a widely cited textbook on chairside milling technology.
kols.internal_notes: Currently on sabbatical. Re-evaluate activation in Q3.

kols.name: Dr. Amina Hassan
kols.bio: Dr. Amina Hassan practices comprehensive family dentistry in Dubai and is an advocate for preventive care in the MENA region. She runs a highly engaged dental education channel with over 200K followers across social platforms.
kols.internal_notes: High social media reach. Consider for ambassador program.
